title: Golden Globes 2026: Best Actress in a Television Series – Drama
text: According to The Hollywood Reporter's comprehensive winners list from the 83rd annual Golden Globes (held January 11, 2026), Rhea Seehorn claimed the award for Best Performance by a Female Actor in a Television Series – Drama for her role in "Pluribus." The category included six nominees: Kathy Bates ("Matlock"), Britt Lower ("Severance"), Helen Mirren ("Mobland"), Bella Ramsey ("The Last of Us"), Keri Russell ("The Diplomat"), and Rhea Seehorn ("Pluribus") - WINNER. Seehorn's win marked a notable achievement in the competitive drama acting categories at this year's ceremony, which was hosted by Nikki Glaser and broadcast on CBS and Paramount+.
